permutation.interpretation: p=0.022. Signal Sharpe is distinguishable from random day selection.

bootstrap.interpretation: Sharpe 0.865, 95% CI [-0.056, 1.937]. CI includes zero — Sharpe is not distinguishable from noise.

concentration.interpretation: Top 5 days account for 6.3% of total P&L (207 active days). P&L is reasonably distributed across trading days.
